pageContext.name: Snow White Deluxe
pageContext.description: The Disney Traditions collection by Jim Shore combines the magic of Disney with the time-honored motifs of handcrafted folk art. Snow White shines in this stunning Masterpiece by Jim Shore. With jewels and Swarovski crystals, this princess wears a stunning gown and sweet smile. She holds the famous apple in her delicate grip as the poison inside shines in metallic paint.  Add this Snow White figurine to your Disney collectibles display today!
